creator: Chris Huber Reitz
name: UNESCO — GenAI in education & research
quote: Publicly available generative AI (GenAI) tools are rapidly emerging, and the release of iterative versions is outpacing the adaptation of national regulatory frameworks.

provenance.note: Re-read 2026-07-19 via web fetch of the coded landing page (page shows last-updated 2026-01-16). Full guidance PDF on unesdoc is Cloudflare-gated headless; landing-page verification only.
